sentences.arabic: أَصْدَرَتْ مَحْكَمَةُ الْعَدْلِ الدَّوْلِيَّةُ حُكْمًا بِارِزًا يَفْتَحُ الطَّرِيقَ أَمَامَ تَعْوِيضَاتٍ غَيْرِ مَسْبُوقَةٍ لِضَحَايَا النِّزَاعَاتِ الْمُسَلَّحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Međunarodni sud pravde donio je važnu presudu koja otvara put ka bezpresedanskim odštetama za žrtve oružanih sukoba.
sentences.translationEn: The International Court of Justice issued a landmark ruling that opens the way for unprecedented compensation for victims of armed conflicts.
